LibraryEsp.note: Effect: Price when selling to shops decreases a little, but also decreases duplication price.
Effect: Price when selling to shops decreases quite a bit, but also decreases duplication price.
Effect: Price when selling to shops decreases quite a lot, but also decreases duplication price.
<CLGR>Low Price x Low Price+<CLNR><CR>Effect: Price when selling to shops decreases quite a lot, but also decreases duplication price.
<CLGR>Low Price+ x Low Price++<CLNR><CR>Effect: Price when selling to shops decreases massively, but also decreases duplication price.
<CLGR>Common Item x Mass Produced<CLNR><CR>Effect: Price when selling to shops plummets, but also decreases duplication price.
Effect: Price when selling to shops increases a little.
Effect: Price when selling to shops increases quite a bit.
Effect: Price when selling to shops increases quite a lot.
<CLGR>High Price x High Price+<CLNR><CR>Effect: Price when selling to shops increases quite a lot.
<CLGR>High Price+ x High Price++<CLNR><CR>Effect: Price when selling to shops increases massively.
<CLGR>High Class x Rare Item<CLNR><CR>Effect: Price when selling to shops skyrockets.
Effect: Increases item quality by 10% when this trait is transferred.
Effect: Increases item quality by 15% when this trait is transferred.
Effect: Increases item quality by 20% when this trait is transferred.
<CLGR>Quality Up x Quality Up+<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases item quality by 20% when this trait is transferred.
<CLGR>Quality Up+ x Quality Up++<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases item quality by 30% when this trait is transferred.
<CLGR>Well Made x Pro Perfection<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases item quality by 50% when this trait is transferred.
Effect: Increases attack item effect by 5%.
Effect: Increases attack item effect by 7%.
Effect: Increases attack item effect by 10%.
<CLGR>Destruction Up x Destruction Up+<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases attack item effect by 12%.
<CLGR>Destruction Up+ x Destruction Up++<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases attack item effect by 17%.
<CLGR>Big Destruction x Intense Destruction<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases attack item effect by 30%.
Effect: Increases attack item effect by 40%.
Effect: Attack item enhanced by a small, fixed amount. Lower power equals stronger enhancement.
Effect: Attack item enhanced by a fixed amount. Lower power equals stronger enhancement.
Effect: Attack item enhanced by a large, fixed amount. Lower power equals stronger enhancement.
<CLGR>Fixed Power x Fixed Power+<CLNR><CR>Effect: Attack item enhanced by a fixed amount. Lower power equals stronger enhancement.
<CLGR>Fixed Power+ x Fixed Power++<CLNR><CR>Effect: Attack item enhanced by a large, fixed amount. Lower power equals stronger enhancement.
<CLGR>Pain in Numbers x Damage in Numbers<CLNR><CR>Effect: Attack item enhanced by a huge, fixed amount. Lower power equals stronger enhancement.
Effect: Attack item enhanced by a ridiculous, fixed amount. This increase scales with the original value.
Effect: Attacks cause 5% additional damage, and increases skill power by 5%.
Effect: Attacks cause 7% additional damage, and increases skill power by 7%.
Effect: Attacks cause 10% additional damage, and increases skill power by 10%.
Effect: Increases recovery item effect by 10%.
Effect: Increases recovery item effect by 15%.
Effect: Increases recovery item effect by 20%.
<CLGR>Recovery Up x Recovery Up+<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases recovery item effect by 25%.
<CLGR>Recovery Up+ x Recovery Up++<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases recovery item effect by 35%.
<CLGR>Big Recovery x Intense Recovery<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases recovery item effect by 50%.
Effect: Increases recovery item effect by 40%.
Effect: Recovery item enhanced by a tiny, fixed amount. Lower power equals stronger effect.
Effect: Recovery item enhanced by a small, fixed amount. Lower power equals stronger effect.
Effect: Recovery item enhanced by a fixed amount. Lower power equals stronger effect.
<CLGR>Fixed Recovery x Fixed Recovery+<CLNR><CR>Effect: Recovery item enhanced by a small, fixed amount. Lower power equals stronger effect.
<CLGR>Fixed Recovery+ x Fixed Recovery++<CLNR><CR>Effect: Recovery item enhanced by a fixed amount. Lower power equals stronger effect.
<CLGR>Medicine Enhance x Big Medicine Enhance<CLNR> Effect: Recovery item enhanced by a large, fixed amount. Lower power equals stronger effect.
Effect: Recovery item enhanced by a ridiculous, fixed amount. This increase scales with the original value.
Effect: Gives item a 15% chance to critical hit.
Effect: Gives item a 25% chance to critical hit.
Effect: Gives item a 35% chance to critical hit.
<CLGR>Critical x Critical+<CLNR><CR>Effect: Gives item a 50% chance to critical hit.
<CLGR>Critical+ x Critical++<CLNR><CR>Effect: Item will always critical hit.
<CLGR>Critical Finish x Always Critical<CLNR><CR>Effect: Item will always critical hit, and KO target (bosses excluded).
Effect: Reduces item number variation slightly, making it easier to score higher numbers.
Effect: Reduces item number variation a little, making it easier to score higher numbers.
Effect: Reduces item number variation, making it easier to score higher numbers.
<CLGR>Stable Effect x Stable Effect+<CLNR><CR>Effect: Reduces item number variation, making it easier to score higher numbers.
<CLGR>Stable Effect+ x Stable Effect++<CLNR><CR>Effect: Halves item number variation, making it easier to score higher numbers.
<CLGR>Stability Emphasis x Solid Effect<CLNR><CR>Effect: Stabilizes item number variation, making it far easier to score higher numbers.
Effect: Increases item use count by 1. Power is reduced a little.
Effect: Increases item use count by 2. Power is reduced slightly.
<CLGR>Use Count +1 x Use Count +2<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases item use count by 3.
Effect: Reduces item use count by 1. Power is increased a little.
Effect: Reduces item use count by 2. Power is increased.
<CLGR>Use Count -1 x Use Count -2<CLNR><CR>Effect: Reduces item use count by 5. Power is massively increased.
Bestows a maximum HP increase.<CR>Effect: Maximum HP increases by 10.
Bestows a maximum HP increase.<CR>Effect: Maximum HP increases by 15.
Bestows a maximum HP increase.<CR>Effect: Maximum HP increases by 25.
<CLGR>HP Enhance x HP Boost<CLNR><CR>Effect: Maximum HP increases by 25.
<CLGR>HP Boost x HP Super Enhance<CLNR><CR>Effect: Maximum HP increases by 40.
<CLGR>Full of Life x Overflowing Life<CLNR><CR>Effect: Maximum HP increases by 70.
Bestows a maximum MP increase.<CR>Effect: Maximum MP increases by 10.
Bestows a maximum MP increase.<CR>Effect: Maximum MP increases by 15.
Bestows a maximum MP increase.<CR>Effect: Maximum MP increases by 25.
<CLGR>MP Enhance x MP Boost<CLNR><CR>Effect: Maximum MP increases by 25.
<CLGR>MP Boost x MP Super Enhance<CLNR><CR>Effect: Maximum MP increases by 40.
<CLGR>Magician's Wisdom x Grand Magician's Wisdom<CLNR><CR>Effect: Maximum MP increases by 70.
Bestows a maximum LP increase.<CR>Effect: Maximum LP increases by 5.
Bestows a maximum LP increase.<CR>Effect: Maximum LP increases by 7.
Bestows a maximum LP increase.<CR>Effect: Maximum LP increases by 10.
<CLGR>LP Enhance x LP Boost<CLNR><CR>Effect: Maximum LP increases by 12.
<CLGR>LP Boost x LP Super Enhance<CLNR><CR>Effect: Maximum LP increases by 17.
<CLGR>Full of Stamina x Unabating Stamina<CLNR><CR>Effect: Maximum LP increases by 30.
<CLGR>Full of Life x Magician's Wisdom<CLNR><CR>Effect: Maximum HP and MP increases by 15.
<CLGR>Overflowing Life x Grand Magician's Wisdom<CLNR><CR>Effect: Maximum HP and MP increases by 25.
<CLGR>Power of Life x Wisdom of the Gods<CLNR><CR>Effect: Maximum HP and MP increases by 40.
Bestows a stat boost.<CR>Effect: Increases base stats by 5%.
Bestows a stat boost.<CR>Effect: Increases base stats by 6%.
Bestows a stat boost.<CR>Effect: Increases base stats by 7%.
<CLGR>Parameters +5% x Parameters +6%<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases base stats by 10%.
<CLGR>Parameters +6% x Parameters +7%<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases base stats by 12%.
<CLGR>Enhance the Body x Draw Out Power<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases base stats by 15%.
Effect: Increases base stats by 20%.
Enhances weapon attack power.<CR>Effect: Increases attack power by 7.
Enhances weapon attack power.<CR>Effect: Increases attack power by 10.
Enhances weapon attack power.<CR>Effect: Increases attack power by 15.
<CLGR>Attack Enhance x Attack Boost<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases attack power by 15.
<CLGR>Attack Boost x Attack Super Enhance<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases attack power by 25.
<CLGR>Power of Beasts x Power of Destruction<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases attack power by 40.
Enhances armor defense.<CR>Effect: Increases defense by 7.
Enhances armor defense.<CR>Effect: Increases defense by 10.
Enhances armor defense.<CR>Effect: Increases defense by 15.
<CLGR>Defense Enhance x Defense Boost<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases defense by 15.
<CLGR>Defense Boost x Defense Super Enhance<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases defense by 25.
<CLGR>Steel Defense x Diamond Defense<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases defense by 40.
Accessories with this will increase speed.<CR>Effect: Increases speed by 7.
Accessories with this will increase speed.<CR>Effect: Increases speed by 10.
Accessories with this will increase speed.<CR>Effect: Increases speed by 15.
<CLGR>Speed Enhance x Speed Boost<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases speed by 15.
<CLGR>Speed Boost x Speed Super Enhance<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases speed by 25.
<CLGR>Speed of Skanda x Speed of Gods<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases speed by 40.
<CLGR>Attack Enhance x Defense Enhance<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases attack & defense by 5.
<CLGR>Attack Enhance x Speed Enhance<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases attack & speed by 5.
<CLGR>Defense Enhance x Speed Enhance<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases defense & speed by 5.
<CLGR>ATK DEF Enhance x ATK SPD Enhance x DEF SPD Enhance (any 2)<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases all stats by 5.
<CLGR>Attack Boost x Defense Boost<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases attack & defense by 7.
<CLGR>Attack Boost x Speed Boost<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases attack & speed by 7.
<CLGR>Defense Boost x Speed Boost<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases defense & speed by 7.
<CLGR>ATK DEF Boost x ATK SPD Boost x DEF SPD Boost (any 2)<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases all stats by 7.
<CLGR>All Stat Enhance x All Stat Boost<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases all stats except resistances by 10.
<CLGR>All Stat Boost x All Stat Super Enhance<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases all stats except resistances by 25.
Effect: Increases maximum HP and MP by 50.
Effect: Increases defense by 30, and increases all base stats by 15%.
Bestows reduced MP consumption effect.<CR>Effect: Reduces MP consumption of skills by 10%.
Bestows reduced MP consumption effect.<CR>Effect: Reduces MP consumption of skills by 15%.
Bestows reduced MP consumption effect.<CR>Effect: Reduces MP consumption of skills by 20%.
<CLGR>Consume MP -10% x Consume MP -15%<CLNR><CR>Effect: Reduces MP consumption of skills by 20%.
<CLGR>Consume MP -15% x Consume MP -20%<CLNR><CR>Effect: Reduces MP consumption of skills by 30%.
<CLGR>Cut MP Consume x Compact MP Consume<CLNR><CR>Effect: Reduces MP consumption of skills by 50%.
Bestows increased skill power effect.<CR>Effect: Increases skill power and MP consumption by 5%.
Bestows increased skill power effect.<CR>Effect: Increases skill power and MP consumption by 7%.
Bestows increased skill power effect.<CR>Effect: Increases skill power and MP consumption by 10%.
<CLGR>Skill Power +5% x Skill Power +7%<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases skill power and MP consumption by 12%.
<CLGR>Skill Power +7% x Skill Power +10%<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases skill power and MP consumption by 17%.
<CLGR>Skill Enhance x Skill Boost<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases skill power and MP consumption by 30%.
<CLGR>Cut MP Consume x Skill Enhance<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases skill power by 7%, and reduces MP consumption by 7%.
<CLGR>Compact MP Consume x Skill Boost<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases skill power by 10%, and reduces MP consumption by 10%.
<CLGR>Halve MP Consume x Skill Super Enhance<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases skill power by 15%, and reduces MP consumption by 15%.
Effect: Increases skill power by 25%, and reduces MP consumption by 25%.
Effect: Increases skill power by 35%, and reduces MP consumption by 35%.
Effect: Massively increases the target's level.
Effect: Massively increases the target's attack power.
Effect: Massively increases the target's defense.
Effect: Massively increases the target's speed.
Effect: Has a <CLGR>chance to inflict Sleep<CLNR> when dealing damage.
Effect: Has a <CLGR>chance to inflict Poison<CLNR> when dealing damage.
Effect: Has a <CLGR>chance to inflict Slow<CLNR> when dealing damage.
Effect: Has a <CLGR>chance to inflict Curse<CLNR> when dealing damage.
Effect: Has a <CLGR>chance to inflict Blind<CLNR> when dealing damage.
Effect: Has a <CLGR>chance to inflict Weak<CLNR> when dealing damage.
Effect: Has a <CLGR>chance to inflict No Heal<CLNR> when dealing damage.
Effect: Has a <CLGR>chance to inflict Seal<CLNR> when dealing damage.
Effect: Massively reduces the target's level, reducing all stats and damage dealt.
Effect: Massively reduces the target's attack power.
Effect: Massively reduces the target's defense.
Effect: Massively reduces the target's speed.
Effect: Absorb 3% of damage dealt through attacks to restore your own HP.
Effect: Absorb 5% of damage dealt through attacks to restore your own HP.
Effect: Absorb 7% of damage dealt through attacks to restore your own HP.
<CLGR>Damage Absorb x Damage Absorb+<CLNR><CR>Effect: Absorb 7% of damage dealt through attacks to restore your own HP.
<CLGR>Damage Absorb+ x Damage Absorb++<CLNR><CR>Effect: Absorb 10% of damage dealt through attacks to restore your own HP.
<CLGR>HP Absorb x Steal Life<CLNR><CR>Effect: Absorb 15% of damage dealt through attacks to restore your own HP.
Effect: Increases attack power by 20, and absorb 10% of damage dealt through attacks to restore your own HP.
Effect: Increases damage dealt to Slag type enemies.
Effect: Increases damage dealt to Plant and Spirit type enemies.
Effect: Increases damage dealt to Animal and Beast type enemies.
Effect: Increases damage dealt to Demon type enemies.
Effect: Increases damage dealt to Dragon type enemies.
Effect: Increases damage dealt to monsters created through magic and alchemy.
Effect: Increases damage dealt to Puni type enemies.
Effect: Increases damage dealt to Undead type enemies.
Effect: Increases damage dealt to Broken targets by 10%.
Effect: Increases damage dealt to Broken targets by 20%.
Effect: Increases damage dealt to Broken targets by 30%.
<CLGR>Enhance Finisher x Enhance Finisher+<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases damage dealt to Broken targets by 30%.
<CLGR>Enhance Finisher+ x Enhance Finisher++<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases damage dealt to Broken targets by 40%.
<CLGR>Merciless Blow x Relentless Blow<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases damage dealt to Broken targets by 60%.
Effect: Enhances item effect according to strength of traits present.
Effect: Greatly enhances item effect according to strength of traits present.
<CLGR>Trait Enhance x Trait Enhance+<CLNR><CR>Effect: Massively enhances item effect according to strength of traits present.
Effect: Enhances item effect according to strength of traits present. Stronger traits equal ridiculously greater enhancement.
Effect: Power increases by number of targets in effect area x 5%.
Effect: Power increases by number of targets in effect area x 10%.
<CLGR>Area Bonus x Area Bonus+<CLNR><CR>Effect: Power increases by number of targets in effect area x 15%.
Effect: Power increases by number of targets in effect area x 20%.
Effect: Power increases by 10 / number of targets in effect area %.
Effect: Power increases by 15 / number of targets in effect area %.
<CLGR>Fewer Bonus x Fewer Bonus+<CLNR><CR>Effect: Power increases by 20 / number of targets in effect area %.
Effect: Power increases by 30 / number of targets in effect area %.
Effect: Power increases by 20 / number of targets in effect area % + number of targets in effect area x 10%.
Effect: Power increases by 10% when use count is 1.
Effect: Power increases by 20% when use count is 1.
<CLGR>Enhance Last x Enhance Last+<CLNR><CR>Effect: Power increases by 30% when use count is 1.
Effect: Power increases by 45% when use count is 1.
Effect: Completely consumes item in 1 use during battle, but increases power by use count x 3%.
Effect: Completely consumes item in 1 use during battle, but increases power by use count x 5%.
<CLGR>Count Compress x Count Compress+<CLNR><CR>Effect: Completely consumes item in 1 use during battle, but increases power by use count x 7%.
Effect: Completely consumes item in 1 use during battle, but increases power by use count x 10%.
Effect: Increases item power by maximum use count x 2%.
Effect: Increases item power by maximum use count x 3%.
<CLGR>Count Bonus x Count Bonus+<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases item power by maximum use count x 5%.
Effect: Increases item power by maximum use count x 7%.
Effect: Reduces WT after using item by 10%. Power is decreased slightly.
Effect: Reduces WT after using item by 20%. Power is decreased a small amount.
<CLGR>Fast Use x Fast Use+<CLNR><CR>Effect: Reduces WT after using item by 30%. Power is decreased a small amount.
Effect: Reduces WT after using item by 50%.
Effect: Wait time after using item increases a little, but power increases a little too.
Effect: Wait time after using item increases, but power increases too.
<CLGR>Power Throw x Power Throw+<CLNR><CR>Effect: Wait time after using item increases a lot, but power increases a lot too.
Effect: Increases item power by a small amount proportional to wait time after using item.
Effect: Increases item power by a decent amount proportional to wait time after using item.
<CLGR>Wait Time Enhance x Wait Time Enhance+<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases item power proportional to wait time after using item.
Effect: Item size increases by 1 level, equipment cost increases by 5.
Effect: Item size increases by 2 levels, equipment cost increases by 10.
Effect: Item size decreases by 1 level, equipment cost decreases by 10.
Effect: Item size decreases by 2 levels, equipment cost decreases by 20.
Effect: Increases item effect by a decent amount as size increases.
Effect: Increases item effect as size increases.
<CLGR>Size Enhance x Size Super Enhance<CLNR><CR>Effect: Increases item effect by a large amount as size increases.
Effect: Reduces equipment cost of usable item by 5.
Effect: Reduces equipment cost of usable item by 8.
<CLGR>Kind of Light x Light<CLNR><CR>Effect: Reduces equipment cost of usable item by 12.
<CLGR>Light x Easy to Handle<CLNR><CR>Effect: Reduces equipment cost of usable item by 20.
Zeal factor enhances the material it resides in.<CR>Effect: Increases HP and attack.
Happy heart enhances the material it resides in.<CR>Effect: Increases MP and defense.
Cunning wit enhances the material it resides in.<CR>Effect: Increases critical bonus and accuracy.
Splendid glory enhances the material it resides in.<CR>Effect: Increases WT delay resistance and Break resistance.
Benevolent light enhances the material it resides in.<CR>Effect: Provides damage reversal and immunity to all ailments.
Wild instinct enhances the material it resides in.<CR>Effect: Increases speed, reduces wait time after using skills.
Persistent faith enhances the material it resides in.<CR>Effect: Provides HP regeneration and chance to avoid KO.
Guiding intuition enhances the material it resides in.<CR>Effect: Increases critical hit rate, has a chance to shorten wait time.
Empty world enhances the material it resides in.<CR>Effect: Provides damage conversion, reduces physical damage taken.
Power of madness enhances the material it resides in.<CR>Effect: Greatly increases attack power, lose lots of HP each turn.
Burning passion enhances the material it resides in.<CR>Effect: Increases all stats by 15, bestows fire and ice resistance.
Unwavering spirit enhances the material it resides in.<CR>Effect: Increases all stats by 15, bestows lightning and physical resistance.
Fog of illusion enhances the material it resides in.<CR>Effect: Swaps HP and MP, adds evasion chance.
Bonds of belief enhances the material it resides in.<CR>Effect: Increases assist effect, provides damage conversion.
Hammer of justice enhances the material it resides in.<CR>Effect: Greatly increases skill power, adds Break value.
Dreadful king enhances the material it resides in.<CR>Effect: Causes additional damage and status effects.
Unceasing desire enhances the material it resides in.<CR>Effect: Absorbs a portion of damage dealt.
Pursuit of knowledge enhances the material it resides in.<CR>Effect: Causes additional damage.
Star of expectation enhances the material it resides in.<CR>Effect: Provides enhancement proportional to level.
Ray of hope enhances the material it resides in.<CR>Effect: Increases maximum HP, provides automatic KO revival.
Awakening courage enhances the material it resides in.<CR>Effect: Provides a bonus against powerful foes and bosses.
Kind soul enhances the material it resides in.<CR>Effect: Provides a Burst Mode bonus and gauge fill rate increase.
Indomitable soul enhances the material it resides in.<CR>Effect: Provides Break resistance and greatly increases speed of recovering from Break.
Effect: Attacks cause 7% additional damage, and increases skill power by 15%.
Effect: Attacks cause 15% additional damage, and increases skill power by 10%.
Effect: Attacks cause 15% additional damage, and increases skill power by 15%.
Effect: Attacks cause 20% additional damage, and increases skill power by 25%.
Effect: Attacks cause 15% additional damage, and increases skill power by 20%.
Effect: Attacks cause between 1 - 50% additional damage.
Effect: Item automatically activates when the user's HP falls below 20% in battle. Consumes MP.
Effect: Item automatically activates when the user's HP falls below 30% in battle. Consumes MP.
Effect: Item automatically activates when the user's HP falls below 40% in battle. Consumes MP.
Effect: Item automatically activates when the user's HP falls below 50% in battle.
Effect: Increases item power by 25%, and makes its effect non-attribute. Non-attribute is not affected by any resistances or weaknesses.
Effect: Has a <CLGR>high chance to inflict Poison<CLNR> when dealing damage.
Effect: Restores some of the target's HP, and also recovers from Poison.
Effect: Temporarily increases all of the target's stats. They will also automatically revive on their next turn after being KO'd.
Effect: Pushes back the target's turn a little. This effect diminishes with each use until the target takes another turn.
Effect: Heat causes continuous damage. The effect is small.
Effect: Cold reduces the target's speed, and also has a low chance of inflicting Slow.
Effect: Increases all stats by 8.
Effect: Increases damage dealt to Puni and magical creatures.
Effect: Reduces skill power by 10%, but also reduces MP consumption by 30%.
Effect: Reduces the target's defense and speed.
Effect: Restores Break value to the target. Also reduces wait time after turns by a small amount.
Effect: Increases attack by 7, and attacks cause a small amount of additional damage.
Effect: The target recovers a small amount of HP, and also recovers from Weak.
Effect: Increases the target's evasion rate. This effect lasts 5 turns.
Effect: Increases attack item effect by 5%, and also has a chance to cause Weak.
Effect: The target recovers a small amount of HP, and also recovers from Curse.
Effect: Price when selling to shops increases quite a lot.
Effect: Increases attack item effect by 15%.
Effect: Increases defense by 10, and also causes a decent amount of HP recovery each turn.
Effect: Increases recovery item effect by 30%, but increases equipment cost by 5.
Effect: Increases the target's maximum HP during battle, and also reduces the effectiveness of status ailments. The effect is small.
Effect: Increases critical hit rate, and also increases damage dealt to Broken targets.
Effect: The target recovers from Poison and No Heal ailments.
Effect: Increases price when selling to shops.
Effect: Increases damage dealt to Demon and Undead enemies.
Effect: Increases damage dealt to Broken targets by 20%, and a portion of damage dealt is absorbed to recover HP.
Effect: Increases all stats by 15, and also increases skill power by 20%.
Effect: Revive from KO, and also removes 3 status ailments.
